titleStmt.title: SII 29.11: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 11. (A.R. No. B. 828 of 1962-63.) SUṄKANŪR, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab setup near the temple of Maṇṇa-Basavaṇṇa.

It states that when the Chālukya king Jagadēkamalladēva was ruling over the empire, queen Bijjaladēvi while camping at Poṭṭaḷakeṟe, made some grant probably to a temple built by Nāgale at Duggapavaṭṭi. The details of which are lost.

It is dated Śaka 95[3], [Bahudhānya], Māgha, śu. [2], sankrānti, Sunday. The given Śaka year do not tally with the cyclic year. Cyclic year Prajāpati occurred in Śaka 953 and that of Bahudhānya in Śaka 960. [Śaka 95[3] (Prajāpati) 1032 A.D. and Bahudhānya (Śaka 960) 1038 A.D.]. If to be considered on the basis of the Śaka year 95[3] (cyclic year Prajāpati) as in the previous record [No. 10] then the tithi corresponds to 1032 A.D., January 17, Monday not Sunday. This may be the intended date of the record.

[The tithi Bahudhānya, Māgha, śu. 2 corresponds to 1038 A.D. December 30, Saturday]. There was no sankrānthi on the day of the tithi in both the cyclic years. [Both the dates fall with in the reign period of the king Jayasiṁha II].
The slab has the sculptures of a huge three-hooded Nāga erect on its tail and a cow at the bottom.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī prithuvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāra
ka satyāsraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābhara
ṇa śrī madjagadēkamalladēvara rājyābhivriddhi
Ācandrārkka tārabara salluttamire satiyanava
rata paramakalyāṇādbhudaya sahasraphaḷabhōga
bhāginī dvitīya lakṣmīsamāneyarappa śrī
mat bijjaladēviyar śakavaruṣa
953 bahudhanya saṁvatsarada māgha suddha 2
saṁkrati Adivara poṭṭaḷakeṟeya nilebīḍinoḷ
duggapavaṭṭiya dēyakke nāgaleyagaḷa
tōranake koṭṭa kūla nāvanōrva
naḷida yya brāhma
ṇaru hata
ka

sāmānyō
yaṁ dharma
sētu
nripāṇāṁ kā
lē kālē pāla
niyō bhavadbhi
sarvvānētā
nbhāvinaḥ pārtthivē
ndra bhūyō bhūyō
yācate rāmabhadra
jarappana bāḷalu
prati pā
satu yaṁ
ru
ṭṭa vāle
kalāpada
dēvakāryya
veṁdu
taḷamayai
damaged

svadattaṁ
paradatta
vāyō harē
ta vasundharā
ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa sa
hasrāṇi
viṣṭhāyāṁ jā
yatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 29.11 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
